## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` — code is formatted
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` — no lint warnings
- [ ] `cargo test` — the suite passes (see CONTRIBUTING.md for which tests need the `claude` CLI on `PATH`)
- [ ] `cargo doc --no-deps` — public items I touched still document cleanly
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I updated docs / doc-comments where the public API changed
